cot_prefix: Okay, let me read through the passage again to make sure I understand the details correctly. The article states that Israel freed 26 Palestinian prisoners early Wednesday. It mentions that this is the second of four groups to be released as part of an agreement. The total number of prisoners to be released in four rounds is 104. The question asks how many had been released by Wednesday. In the second paragraph, it describes the reaction in Gaza and the West Bank. Specifically, it says that 5 prisoners were released to Gaza and 21 to the West Bank. The 26 prisoners mentioned at the start of the article would be the sum of these two groups (5 + 21 = 26).
